meta.objective: M3/M4/M8 (+M5/M7) integrity-lock consolidation: selectivity divide-by-epsilon correction, router Wilson-CI restatement, honest-counting drop-in paper wording
meta.label_mapping_note: Reviewer mandate labels: M3=selectivity-artifact, M4=router-CI, M8=honest-counting, M5=US-consistency, M7=grouping-reframe. The iter-5 eval (D4) used DIFFERENT internal labels (its M3=counting, M4=selectivity, M5=control, M8=transparency); mapped by CONTENT.
meta.compute: cpu-only, $0, no GPU, no encoding, no LLM

M3_selectivity_artifact.source_path: D1 art_4L1MZxvWYlGd metadata.replication_tables['65k'] + D2 art_0CZwPjG2YMCf metadata.per_case (16k Georgia)

corrected_primary.rule: exclude floor_limited OR no_on_target from absorption-regime cases

corrected_secondary.rule: exclude ONLY the two divide-by-epsilon artifacts {46143, 60904}

comparably_surgical.statement: 16k Georgia (1722.46x, collateral 2.88e-05) and 65k Georgia (collateral exactly 0.0, below numerical precision; on-target 0.03711 recovered as selectivity*1e-8, matching its dense collateral 0.03711) are COMPARABLY surgical -- both have collateral at/below ~1e-5 precision. The 3.7e6x-vs-1722x gap is a divide-by-epsilon artifact, not a real ~2000x improvement.

l9_partial_note.interpretation: Layer-9 width-16k is a DIFFERENT (layer,width) point: a cleaner layer-9 parent means Georgia LOSES its absorption hole (recall-hole ~0.003) while Jordan KEEPS its hole (recall-hole ~0.536) and yields a confirmed surgical edit (~2376x). This is honest (layer,width)-dependence of WHICH token absorbs, not a contradiction of the layer-12 65k result.

M3_selectivity_artifact.paper_wording: On the 4x-wider 65k SAE the absorption single-absorber edits remain surgical, but two of nine cases are divide-by-epsilon artifacts: the Georgia absorber (46143) and a Jordan candidate (60904) have kg_collateral=0 exactly, so the stored ratios (3710589x; 22486x with NO measurable on-target effect) reduce to on_target/1e-8. Excluding floor-limited (collateral below numerical precision) and no-on-target-effect cases, the corrected 65k absorption mean selectivity is 721.7x (median 676.3x, n=4), not 466997x; the more lenient rule that keeps the tiny null cases gives mean 483.1x (median 184.6x, n=6). The 65k Georgia edit (collateral below precision; reported as floor-limited >= ~371x at a 1e-4 collateral floor, or >= ~1290x referenced to the smallest reliably-measured 16k collateral 2.9e-5) is COMPARABLY surgical to the 16k Georgia edit (1722x, collateral 2.9e-5) -- the dictionaries are comparably surgical, not 2000x apart.

M4_router_ci.source_path: D3 art_4q5Om8wdqZuz metadata.prospective_hitrate_primary / prospective_hitrate / new_letter_report / primary_rule

vs_h_secondary.flag: SECONDARY / NON-PRIMARY: uses unit-beats-h-pool ground truth, NOT the primary sign(auc_unit - auc_a). Do NOT cherry-pick this as 'the router works'.

derivation.definition: predict ABSORPTION-regime iff (parent recall-hole > 0.7795); else CO-FIRING-regime

demote_or_validated.note: depends_on does NOT include a prospective-expansion experiment; the iter-6 run tree contains no completed full_method_out.json with an absorption-predicted Wilson CI excluding 0.5, so DEMOTE is the default and correct outcome.

M4_router_ci.paper_wording: The recall-hole router is derivation-perfect (balanced accuracy 1.0 on 12 derivation concepts) but OUT-OF-SAMPLE-UNVALIDATED: on the held-out prospective set the absorption-predicted hit-rate is exactly chance (3/6=0.50, Wilson 95% CI [0.188,0.812]) and the combined rate is 11/18=0.61 (Wilson [0.386,0.797]) -- both CIs INCLUDE 0.5 -- and recall-hole=1.0 over-predicts absorption on new spelling letters F/M/W (which measure co-firing). We therefore report it as an EXPLORATORY screening DIAGNOSTIC, not a validated a-priori predictor.

M8_honest_counting.source_path: counting/control/transparency CARRIED from D4 art_-k4Yg-l4NaNO; selectivity RE-VERIFIED from D2 art_0CZwPjG2YMCf metadata.per_case

non_hole_survivors.reason_not_a_hole: recall_anchor_selection=0.768 > HOLE_RECALL_MAX=0.6 and not < overall_anchor_recall_selection(0.42162162162162165) - 0.10; is_hole flag stored False
recall_anchor_selection=1.0 > HOLE_RECALL_MAX=0.6 and not < overall_anchor_recall_selection(0.363013698630137) - 0.10; is_hole flag stored False

selectivity_reverified.mean_vs_median_clarification: the previously reported '1452x median' is the MEAN of the n=6 absorption set; the median is 1262.21x.
selectivity_reverified.cross_family_counterexample: spelling 'large' (prec 0.571 -> 802x) BEATS taxonomic US-4760 (prec 0.709 -> 7.8x): precision predicts selectivity only WITHIN family

control_random_single_latent.corrected_wording: The repair control is a RANDOM SINGLE content-responsive-latent addition: each other content-responsive latent (not in the unit) is added individually to the anchor (ctrl_detect = base[:,None] | ctrl_fire is a per-latent broadcast), yielding a DISTRIBUTION of single-latent recall gains (one per latent); the KG-named absorber counts as a repair only if its gain exceeds the 95th/99th percentile of that single-latent-addition distribution (kg_percentile_vs_random = (ctrl_gain < gain_kg).mean()) AND the paired-bootstrap CI of KG-detection minus the per-window MEAN single-latent addition (rand_detect_perwin) excludes 0. No union/any-of/max-pool over the other latents is ever taken.
control_random_single_latent.drop_phrasing: DROP 'full random-addition population' / 'adds every other latent'; it is the percentile within the SINGLE-latent-addition gain distribution

transparency_paper_table.caption: Auditability-vs-AUC tradeoff (first-letter). The human-auditable compact named unit (anchor + diagnostic-corroborated absorbers) costs AUC -0.056..-0.200 vs the 15-wide max-pool (per-letter bootstrap CIs all exclude 0), yet the named compact structure carries auditable signal: ensemble member-labels agree at 0.730 vs a 0.096 shuffle null (gap 0.634, CI [0.545,0.724]); per-letter confident-label fraction L 0.87 / O 0.80 / T 0.93 / I 0.87 / D 0.67 (absorbers 0.756 vs anchors 0.43).

numeric_below_gate.note: numeric absorption testbed is eligibility+pooling only; the form-free absorption diagnostic is unconfirmed because digit-token cosine 0.876 < 0.90 gating threshold (carried; recorded descriptively in D1 65k gating as well).

M8_honest_counting.paper_wording_count: KG-guided recall-repair yields 30 repair variants (k-track and diagnostic edges) surviving Benjamini-Hochberg FDR<=0.05 out of 69 tested, spanning 22 DISTINCT suppressed-parent recall holes across spelling (13), homograph-taxonomic (3), and numeric (6); 6 sub-contexts contribute two coincident variants (kg_ktrack and kg_diagnostic naming the same latent), and 2 survivors (numeric/percent, L/layer) are not recall holes (the parent anchor already recalls the sub-context on the selection fold), so the distinct-hole count is 22, not 30 (= 30 - 6 double-count-redundant - 2 non-hole).
M8_honest_counting.paper_wording_selectivity: Over the n=6 absorption cases (which include the partial-surgical United-States/4760 at 7.8x), surgical selectivity has mean=1452.5x and median=1262.2x; restricting to the n=5 cleanly-surgical cases (SURGICAL_EDIT_CONFIRMED: taxonomic Georgia/16009 1722x, Jordan/540 2722x, Jordan/8347 3247x, United-States/846 214x, first-letter large/8463 802x) gives median=1722.5x. The previously reported '1452x median' is in fact the MEAN of the n=6 absorption set.
M8_honest_counting.paper_wording_softened_precision: Absorber precision predicts surgical selectivity as a strong WITHIN-FAMILY observation (taxonomic Spearman rho=0.900, p=0.037); across families the relationship breaks (the spelling 'large' absorber at precision 0.571 reaches 802x, exceeding the taxonomic United-States absorber at precision 0.709 which reaches only 7.8x; all-7 rho=0.679, absorption-6 rho=0.714).

M5_us_consistency.source_path: classification carried (M1 recall-hole 0.197 / aggregate 0.23, tau_h 0.78); 846 selectivity verified from D2 art_0CZwPjG2YMCf
M5_us_consistency.paper_wording: United States is classified as CO-FIRING (aggregate parent recall-hole 0.20-0.23 < 0.5; router threshold tau_h 0.78), yet its narrow absorber 846 still yields a surgical single-sub-context edit (214x at 16k). We present US as a router FALSE-NEGATIVE: CCRG helps even where the aggregate router predicted it should not. The firing-Jaccard discrepancy (0.04 for the specific absorber 846 vs 0.20 for the aggregate detector the router uses) reflects that a precise specialist can exist inside an aggregate that reads co-firing.

M7_grouping_reframe.source_path: wins trace to individual absorbers in D2 art_0CZwPjG2YMCf per_case; C-track / set-cover facts carried from prior experiments
M7_grouping_reframe.paper_wording: We position the two-track algorithm as a TRAINING-FREE, LABEL-FREE DISCOVERY PROCEDURE: its demonstrated value is PROPOSING the single precise absorber latent that a marginal-attribution ranking silently drops (Georgia 16009, large 8463, US 846), not multi-member classification -- the C-track ties weak baselines (toxicity AUC 0.762 vs (a) 0.765) and set-cover-specific selection appears on only three slices (first-letter I, D, and taxonomic Georgia).
